name: The Blooms at Ruyi Pavilion
overview: A determined goldsmith’s daughter, Fu Rong, escapes an arranged marriage and crosses paths with the proud Prince of Xiao, Xu Jin. Together, they uncover corruption, confront hidden masterminds, and foil a rebellion - emerging from danger to build a peaceful life together.

trailers.title: Official Trailer: The Blooms At RUYI Pavilion | 如意芳霏 | iQIYI
